English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
James H. Gillespie papers
Gillespie, James Howard.
24-2-3293
1.0 cubic feet. 1.0 cubic feet.
1943-1996. Biographical material, published material. Biographical material, reprints and several editions of Hagan and Bruner's Infectious Diseases of Domestic Animals, the seminal veterinary text authored by William Arthur Hagan and Dorsey William Bruner, et al. Collection material in English, Japanese, Italian, and Spanish <<<<<<< HEAD 2 ======= 2 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 4828411
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Laura Finkel
Date completed:
August 2003
EAD encoding:
Laura Finkel, 2003
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
James H. Gillespie is Professor of Veterinary Microbiology, Emeritus, Cornell University College of Veterinary Medicine.
Cite As:
James H. Gillespie Papers, #24-02-3293. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
PROVENANCE
Gift of James H. Gillespie.
Scope and content
Biographical material; reprints and several editions of Hagan and Bruner's Infectious Diseases of Domestic Animals, the seminal veterinary text authored by William Arthur Hagan and Dorsey William Bruner, et al.; and copy inscribed by the authors to Dr. Gillespie of Review of Veterinary Microbiology by Ernst L. Biberstein and Yuan Chung Zee. Also, memoir: "How Lucky Can You Get!", 2004 and two reprints about foot-and-mouth disease in Argentina, 1966 and 1974.
Foot-and-mouth disease -- Argentina. Veterinary microbiology -- Study and teaching. New York State College of Veterinary Medicine -- Faculty. Gillespie, James Howard. Bruner, Dorsey William, 1906- Hagan, William Arthur, 1893-1963.
